name: PrLlmReview
description: Automatically reviews pull request diffs using an onsite OpenAI-compatible LLM and posts findings as PR comments.
helpMarkDown: Fetches the PR diff, sends it to an onsite LLM, and posts the review as a summary comment plus inline line-level comments.
author: Your Organisation

inputs.name: llmBaseUrl
inputs.label: LLM Base URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base URL of the onsite LLM, e.g. http://llm-server/v1

inputs.name: llmModel
inputs.label: LLM Model Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Model name to pass in the API request

inputs.name: llmApiKey
inputs.label: LLM API Key
inputs.helpMarkDown: API key if required — store as a secret pipeline variable

inputs.name: caBundlePath
inputs.label: CA Bundle Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Absolute path to a PEM/CRT CA bundle file on the build agent. Required when your LLM server or ADO server uses a certificate signed by an internal or self-signed CA.

inputs.name: maxFilesPerReview
inputs.label: Max Files Per Review
inputs.helpMarkDown: Cap on the number of files sent to the LLM to avoid context overflow

inputs.name: maxLinesPerFile
inputs.label: Max Lines Per File
inputs.helpMarkDown: Files exceeding this line count are truncated with a warning

inputs.name: excludePatterns
inputs.label: Exclude Patterns
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma-separated glob patterns for files to skip

inputs.name: postInlineComments
inputs.label: Post Inline Comments
inputs.helpMarkDown: Toggle inline comment posting on specific diff lines on/off

inputs.name: failOnSeverity
inputs.label: Fail On Severity
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optionally fail the pipeline when findings reach this level: none, info, low, medium, high, critical
